The '''K'vath system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]<ref name="EAOC" /> that contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[K'vath 5]] and its [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Alakatha/Legends|Alakatha]].<ref name="I,J" />

In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] defeated the [[Invids]] in the system to prevent a pirate [[Battle of Alakatha|raid]] on Alakatha, a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] resort.<ref name="I,J" />

==Appearances==
